name: linGetMeasBaudrate
title: linGetMeasBaudrate
description: With this function it is possible to retrieve results of a last baud rate measurement, which is done by calling linMeasHeaderBaudrate() or linMeasRespBaudrate() functions.
return: Returns the last measured baud rate [in bit/sec] or -1 on failure.

description: Test case for measuring baud rate using LIN header event.
These test cases can only be used in the context of test module nodes.
Test case for measuring baud rate using certain data byte of a LIN frame.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
